classOfSecurities.description: Whether the class is common or preferred stock

parValue.description: Par value for the class of securities

totalAuthorizedShares.description: Total number of authorized shares for the class of securities

totalDesignatedShares.description: Total shares designated to one or more stock designations for the class

totalOutstandingShares.description: Total outstanding shares from all stock designations for the class

totalCommonStockEquivalentShares.description: Total fully diluted shares from all stock designations for the class

stockDesignations.description: List of all stock designations for the class of securities
